matrix.targetBefore: /api/ksl with arbitrary HTTPS or /api/* override
matrix.chessMainOverseas: VITE_API_URL via rejected /CALL and browser HMAC
matrix.liveEvidence: Direct HTTPS works server-side; cross-origin browser CORS grant is empty
matrix.targetDecision: Exact confirmed HTTPS origin only; no repository proxy; cross-origin browser state unavailable

matrix.targetBefore: 8000ms configurable
matrix.targetDecision: Keep 8000ms default; retain bounded public timeout override

matrix.targetBefore: withCredentials true for all calls
matrix.targetDecision: Public reads omit browser credentials; no cookie auth is claimed

matrix.targetBefore: browser Bearer from persisted account token
matrix.pgnViewer: legacy bearer or proxy token depending on client
matrix.chessMainOverseas: browser HMAC Authorization; replay token is in request body
matrix.targetDecision: Remove generic browser auth-header injection

matrix.targetBefore: transport z.unknown plus recursive endpoint aliases
matrix.targetDecision: Axios returns unknown; each repository validates one exact envelope and strips unknown fields

matrix.targetBefore: PostLoginByPhone with empty openid
matrix.pgnViewer: no independent password-login implementation used by target
matrix.chessMainOverseas: MD5 digest duplicated in code/pwd; mobile/tel; Type/type 0; login_func appid/func and hard-coded openid
matrix.targetDecision: Do not submit until non-openid, non-HMAC Web request is verified; never persist password/digest

matrix.targetBefore: speculative token/jwttoken/jwtToken/loginToken aliases
matrix.pgnViewer: legacy token families through Mini Program handoff
matrix.targetDecision: Only content.token/content.uid are Web-source fields; runtime remains blocked with request contract

matrix.targetBefore: indefinite legacy localStorage keys plus URL absorption
matrix.chessMainOverseas: web-storage-cache token/user records with default expiry wrapper
matrix.targetDecision: Remove URL absorption and legacy keys; no restored session until a safe Web login lifecycle is verified

matrix.targetBefore: local clear with correct private-state cleanup
matrix.chessMainOverseas: local user clear; token-key cleanup is internally inconsistent; no remote endpoint
matrix.targetDecision: Keep scoped target cleanup; clear centralized local session; do not invent remote logout

matrix.targetBefore: HTTP classification only; no store invalidation or expiry
matrix.pgnViewer: partial refresh and Cloudreve error handling
matrix.targetDecision: 401 invalidates accepted private session/cache; 403 remains permission-denied; deterministic expiry fails closed when a future verified token supplies it

matrix.targetBefore: start/max/search/type/uid/month/year/actflag with speculative scalar/null conversion
matrix.liveEvidence: Both numeric scalar month and source array form were accepted; array is the Web consumer contract
matrix.targetDecision: Typed normalized filters; month is an integer array when selected; no uid for public list

matrix.targetBefore: recursive Details/content/data/list aliases and speculative field aliases
matrix.pgnViewer: consumer treats returned value as list after proxy unwrapping
matrix.liveEvidence: Exact envelope and 12 detail fields verified
matrix.targetDecision: Endpoint-specific Zod schema and explicit mapping only

matrix.targetBefore: route hdid body id with recursive aliases
matrix.pgnViewer: not used in the same direct Web path
matrix.chessMainOverseas: source function incorrectly hard-codes one id
matrix.liveEvidence: body.id using current route hdid returned matching detail envelope
matrix.targetDecision: Keep route hdid correction; validate explicit content fields

matrix.targetBefore: recursive array discovery and id/name aliases
matrix.liveEvidence: Exact envelope and item fields verified
matrix.targetDecision: Use ticketid as group identifier and ticketname as label

matrix.targetBefore: recursive aliases and invented round number/status/end fields
matrix.targetDecision: Map only round_id/starttime and cur_round; derive display ordinal from list position

matrix.targetBefore: body includes empty uid/jgid/name and speculative DTO aliases
matrix.chessMainOverseas: adds name and jgid variants; content[] direct
matrix.targetDecision: Keep source-confirmed filters only; map id/sort_id/names/ratings/status; no invented points/startTime

matrix.targetBefore: account token as browser Bearer; body {gameid}
matrix.chessMainOverseas: body {gameid,token}; token comes from fingerprint guest login
matrix.targetDecision: Remove incorrect account-Bearer request and keep replay unavailable

matrix.targetBefore: speculative PGN/move aliases and synthesized PGN
matrix.chessMainOverseas: durinGame consumes datas.fen, datas.moves[].m, gametype.parameters, result object
matrix.targetDecision: Inventory exact game shape; do not synthesize success until authenticated real variants are verified

matrix.targetBefore: stable prefix but unknown key arguments; AbortSignal present; private meta only on replay
matrix.targetDecision: Typed normalized keys, signals everywhere, deterministic retry, explicit public/private metadata, scoped private cleanup

matrix.targetBefore: sanitized handoff followed by truthful unavailable workspace state
matrix.pgnViewer: remote storage and Cloudreve paths with legacy credentials and writes
matrix.targetDecision: Keep unavailable handoff; do not call blocked source contracts

matrix.targetBefore: truthful unavailable state
matrix.chessMainOverseas: hard-coded credential/signing material and publish-capable client
matrix.targetDecision: Keep unavailable until a subscribe-only credential lifecycle is verified; publish remains rejected
